title: Kusarigama Warrior Dynamic Battle Scene Prompt
description: A highly detailed, cinematic prompt for generating a dynamic anime-scale battle scene featuring a Japanese-style warrior wielding a kusarigama, emphasizing an intense low-angle perspective, motion blur, and high-contrast lighting in a collapsing shrine setting.
content:
Masterpiece quality, theatrical anime-scale dynamic battle scene. A Japanese-style warrior is the main subject. Intense low-angle perspective with exaggerated depth; extreme perspective and bold framing with the weapon thrusting forward as if breaking through the screen.

Weapon: a kusarigama. The sickle blade gleams sharply; the chain whips in a wide arc, and the weighted end rushes toward the camera with heavy motion blur. Captured at the exact instant of launching the attack—piercing gaze, taut determined expression. The chain’s movement slices the air, leaving a pale platinum spark-like luminous trail as an afterimage.

Setting: a collapsing old shrine deep in the mountains at night. Wet stone steps, a fallen torii gate, cracked stone lanterns. The impact shatters the stone pavement; fragments and splashing water burst upward. Violent wind sends talismans and paper scraps swirling; clothing and hair whip wildly. High-contrast dramatic lighting: cold moonlight crossing with warm red lantern light, deep shadows. Background filled with thick mist and dark storm clouds, tree branches bending and flying in the gale. Wide-angle lens, dynamic motion blur, cinematic.

Vertical cinematic poster composition, 9:16 aspect ratio, no text.

title: Samurai Sniper Extreme Low-Angle Prompt
description: A detailed, cinematic prompt for generating a dynamic anime-scale battle scene featuring a samurai sniper, emphasizing an extreme ground-level low-angle viewpoint, exaggerated depth, and the moment of firing on a Japanese castle rooftop at night.
content:
Masterpiece quality, theatrical anime-scale dynamic battle scene. A samurai character is the main subject. Extreme ground-level low-angle viewpoint with a wide-angle lens and exaggerated depth. Bold framing with the sniper rifle’s barrel and muzzle dominating the foreground, thrusting toward the viewer, while the samurai’s razor-sharp gaze anchors the back of the composition.

Captured at the exact instant of firing. Cheek pressed to the stock, eye locked through the scope, teeth clenched in determination. A blinding muzzle flash blooms; sparks and fine embers scatter forward. A streak suggesting the bullet’s path slices through the night air, while the shock kicks up dust and tiny fragments of roof tile. Subtle recoil pushes the rifle and shoulder back; cloth and hair lag behind with dynamic motion blur. The scope glass catches a cold blue-green reflection, and the rifle’s metal surfaces show finely detailed reflections and crisp edge highlights.

Setting: the rooftop of a white Japanese castle keep (white plaster walls), high above the grounds. Clear night sky with crisp air; moonlight creates strong rim lighting along roof ridges and the samurai’s silhouette. Shachihoko ornaments, gables, white walls, and wooden structures read clearly in silhouette and detail. The impact and movement crack roof tiles; broken pieces skitter and tumble. In the distance, quiet castle-town lights glow, with a few thin clouds drifting slowly across the sky. High-contrast dramatic lighting, cinematic contrast between warm foreground flash and cool moonlight. Filmic particles (dust, sparks) in the air.

Vertical cinematic poster composition, 9:16 aspect ratio, no text.

title: Seamless Cinematic Japanese Food Video Prompt
description: A comprehensive, cinematic prompt used to generate a 4-cut video focused on Japanese cuisine, emphasizing ASMR elements, smooth transitions (match cuts/pans), warm lighting, and a minimalist piano soundtrack with Japanese instrument accents. The prompt was used for both image generation (Nano Banana
content:
和食料理をテーマに、4つのカットがシームレスにつながるシネマティックな映像を生成してください。

最初のカットはクローズアップで調理音や包丁のリズム、素材に触れる手の動きを丁寧に捉え、湯気や食材の質感を強調するASMR的な音作りで始めます。カメラは浅い被写界深度とスローモーションを併用して手元から女性の仕草へ自然に導き、ほのかな驚きやにこやかな反応などの小さな動きで可愛らしさを示します。ここからマッチカットやパンで滑らかに移行します。

2つ目は盛り付けの中景で箸の動きや器に素材をのせる瞬間を美しく切り取り、器と食材が響き合う繊細な音を強調して丁寧さや愛情深さを通じて魅力を引き立てます。
続くカットは俯瞰からの構図で完成した料理の全体像を見せつつカメラがゆっくり寄り、女性が一口食べる瞬間をクローズアップして息づかいや微かな反応を繊細に捉え、視聴者の共感を誘います。

最後はテーブル越しの温かな交流へとつなぎ、柔らかなパンとクロスフェードで余韻を残す構成にして、笑い声や会話の断片を控えめに混ぜて親密さを表現してください。色調はフィルミックで暖色寄り、ハイライトは穏やかに抑えた自然なライティングを基本とし、音楽はミニマルなピアノに和楽器のアクセントを加え、効果音は調理音と食べる音を丁寧にミックスして臨場感を高めます。全体のテンポはゆったりとし、各カットの終わりを次の始まりに音と動きで自然につなげることを優先してください。

title: Samurai Sniper Dynamic Battle Scene Prompt
description: A highly detailed, cinematic prompt for generating a dynamic anime-scale battle scene featuring a samurai sniper in a prone firing pose on a Japanese castle rooftop at night, emphasizing extreme low-angle composition, muzzle flash, and high-contrast lighting.
content:
Masterpiece quality, theatrical anime-scale dynamic battle scene. A samurai character is the main subject (preserving a traditional samurai feel, optionally blended with subtle modern gear elements). Prone firing pose (low-profile/propped close to the roof surface), body flattened to the tiles, elbows braced for stability. Cheek pressed to the stock while peering through the scope, one eye narrowed, an intense focused stare and clenched teeth conveying tension and determination.

Composition and angle: the camera is placed almost on the roof tiles—an extreme ground-level ultra low-angle. Wide-angle lens with exaggerated perspective and strong depth. A diagonal composition: the sniper rifle runs from the extreme lower foreground into the midground, leading the viewer’s eye directly to the samurai’s gaze. The muzzle and muzzle flash dominate the extreme foreground, appearing oversized and close enough to “break the screen,” while the face (especially the eyes) stays crisp and sharp.

Action: captured at the exact instant of firing. A large, stylized muzzle flash erupts in the foreground; sparks, glowing embers, and thin smoke burst outward. Ejected brass and scattered casings on the tiles reinforce the sense of ongoing fire. A faint luminous streak suggests the bullet’s path slicing through the night air. Subtle recoil pushes the rifle and shoulder back; dynamic motion blur on the weapon and sleeves, while the eyes and brow remain tack-sharp. The scope glass reflects a cold blue-green sheen; metal surfaces show finely detailed reflections and crisp edge highlights.

Setting: the rooftop of a white Japanese castle keep (white plaster walls), under a clear night sky. Clean moonlight creates strong rim lighting along roof ridges and the samurai’s silhouette. Traditional roof features—curved ceramic tiles, ridge lines, gables, and shachihoko ornaments—read clearly in silhouette and detail. The firing shock and weight shift chip and crack tiles; fragments and dust jump up and arc toward the camera. High-contrast cinematic lighting with a dramatic warm–cool split: warm muzzle flash versus cool moonlight. Filmic particles (dust, embers) in the air.

title: Vlog Style Video Generation Prompt
description: A detailed prompt used to generate a video-style shot of a woman using Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image) and then animating it with Google Veo 3.1. The prompt focuses on realistic lighting, composition, and a natural, relaxed expression suitable for a fashion vlog.
content:
正面を向いた動画風のショットを作成。カメラは顔の高さで固定、被写体の真正面に配置。被写体は姿勢と構図から座っていることが示されている。

構図はシンプルで安定しており、劇的なアングルや目立つカメラの動きはない。照明は[UGCスタイルのショットを考慮した現実的な照明を追加]から。顔ははっきり見える。

被写体の表情は穏やかでリラックスしており、自然なほのかな微笑みを浮かべている。まるでカメラに向かってVlogを語り始めようとしているかのようだ。画質は夜間の屋内で撮影された動画（高画質）を反映しており、フィルター、美化効果、人工的なシャープネス処理は一切施されていない。

空間は個人的な空間として感じられる。ボケはカメラの限界によるもので、人工的な被写界深度効果ではない。全体的な雰囲気は温かく、明るく、親密で、被写体が話し始める直前のリアルなVlogの瞬間を思わせる。

女性のセリフは、「今日のファッションは【ファッションの特徴を追加】がポイントです！」と優しい口調で話しながら服を触っている。最後に笑顔になる。

description: A high-fidelity prompt requiring strict facial replication of the subject (Sadia Sink) while applying a high-concept fashion studio portrait style. The theme is 'Queen of Hearts', featuring a deep crimson strapless gown and massive layers of sheer red chiffon sculpted into a perfect heart shape behi
content:
High-fidelity, true-to-source facial replication. Maintain 100% of the original person's facial likeness and identity from the provided user image. The user's original photo is for identity reference ONLY. You MUST NOT alter, enhance, or stylize the subject's facial structure in any way. This includes, but is not limited to: do not change the shape of the cheeks, nose, eyes, or jawline. Avoid any 'doll-like' or idealized features. The replication of the face must be perfect. You MUST replace the original pose, clothing, and background with the new style described below. Apply the following style:

Apply a slender, elegant body build to the subject. The image is a high-concept fashion studio portrait with a "Queen of Hearts" playing card theme, presented in a portrait orientation with a 4:5 aspect ratio. The subject has long, wavy brunette hair that cascades loosely down their back. The subject is captured in a medium shot, standing with their body angled away from the camera, twisting their torso to look back over their left shoulder directly at the lens. The pose is contained and elegant, with arms crossed over the chest, hugging the bodice. The subject is wearing a stunning, deep crimson red strapless gown. The most critical stylistic element is the manipulation of the dress's fabric: massive layers of sheer, semi-translucent red chiffon or organza float and billow outwards behind the subject, sculpted to form a perfect, voluminous heart shape that dominates the frame. The fabric catches the light, showing texture, folds, and varying degrees of opacity, ranging from deep ruby in the shadows to bright cherry red where the light hits the sheer layers. The subject also wears matching matte red opera-length gloves that extend past the elbows, blending seamlessly with the red gown. The lighting is soft, diffused, high-key studio lighting that illuminates the subject evenly and creates soft shadows, emphasizing the three-dimensionality of the heart-shaped fabric. The background is a clean, solid white seamless backdrop that provides strong contrast to the red subject. A specific graphic element is present: in the top left corner, a large red serif capital letter "Q" is positioned directly above a red heart suit symbol, mimicking the index of a playing card. The overall aesthetic is romantic, polished, and editorial.

title: Cinematic Gourmet Burger Explosion Prompt (Code Style)
description: A highly structured, code-like prompt using Python syntax (importing physics and lighting modules) to generate a cinematic advertising image of a gourmet burger exploding in slow motion, detailing ingredients, textures, and studio lighting setup.
content:
import physics_engine as cinematic
from studio_lighting import RimLight, SpotLight

class GourmetBurger:
    def __init__(self):
        self.state = "assembled"
        self.ingredients = [
            "toasted_brioche_bun", 
            "wagyu_patty", 
            "molten_cheddar", 
            "crispy_lettuce", 
            "heirloom_tomato",
            "secret_sauce_droplets"
        ]

    def trigger_explosion(self):
        """
        Executes the slow-motion deconstruction effect.
        """
        self.state = "mid-air_burst"
        
        for item in self.ingredients:
            # Applying physics for the "flying" effect
            item.apply_force(direction="outward", velocity="slow_motion")
            item.render_texture(quality="hyper_detailed")
            
        # Suspends liquid particles in 3D space
        cinematic.suspend_fluids(type="sauce", density="high_viscosity")

# Environment Configuration
scene = cinematic.Scene(background="dark_studio_charcoal")
scene.add_lighting([
    RimLight(intensity=0.8, color="warm_gold"),
    SpotLight(target="patty_texture", focus="ultra_sharp")
])

# Execute the render
burger = GourmetBurger()
burger.trigger_explosion()

render_output = scene.capture(style="cinematic_advertising", realistic=True)

title: Character Generation Prompt (Step 1)
description: The first step in a multi-step process, this prompt is designed to generate a high-resolution (4K recommended) image of a main character, focusing on composition, high-contrast lighting, and detailed facial features of a young Japanese woman with a K-pop idol aesthetic.
content:
I. Composition & Spatial Layout
1.Framing & Scale: The subject occupies approximately 60–70% of the frame height. Leave at least 30% of the frame height as empty space above the head. Both left and right sides retain clearly visible empty wall space.
2.Visual Focus: A minimal, uncluttered background designed to strongly emphasize facial structure, eye expression, and skin quality.

II. Lighting & Shadow Style
1.Key Light: Intense natural daylight, side-backlit with a slight reverse angle, cool-toned, producing extreme high-contrast separation between highlights and shadows.
2.Light Characteristics: Dense, hard-edged leaf-shadow patterns projected across the wall and the subject’s body and face. Shadow edges are razor-sharp with extremely narrow penumbra.
3.Highlight Control: Large areas of the background are deliberately overexposed while retaining faint surface texture, creating a glowing, almost blinding spatial atmosphere.

III. Subject Appearance (Face & Hair — Reference Applied)
1.Facial Structure:
A young Japanese woman in her 20s with a refined V-shaped face, sharp jawline, and high-definition facial contours. Overall facial balance is elegant yet striking, with high visual impact.
2.Skin Quality:
Porcelain-toned Japanese skin with a cool undertone. Ultra-smooth, luminous texture enhanced by strong contrast lighting while retaining realistic skin detail.
3.Eyes & Expression:
・Large, sharp fox-shaped eyes
・Confident gaze directed straight into the camera
・Expression carries a cool, playful, slightly teasing energy
・K-pop idol–inspired eyeliner with clearly emphasized aegyosal
・Overall expression is controlled, calm, and subtly provocative rather than smiling
4.Mouth:
Relaxed lips with a subtle, effortless smirk. Glossy gradient lips with a refined sheen, never exaggerated.
5.Hair Style:
Long, sleek, straight black hair reaching the waist, with perfectly straight, neatly trimmed Japanese bangs. Hair finish is glossy, clean, and fashion-forward, moving minimally in the light.

content:
Ultra-realistic moody Paris street editorial portrait, shot outside a vintage shopfront at dusk/overcast twilight, film-scanned look. A young woman (early–mid 20s), fair skin, slim build, shoulder-length light brown/dark blonde hair with a soft center/loose part, slightly tousled ends. Expression: calm, distant, slightly tired gaze; lips relaxed, almost pouting; eyes looking straight at camera with subtle softness. Pose: standing close to the shop entrance, shoulders slightly forward, body angled 3/4; one hand tucked into the coat pocket (hand visible at pocket opening), the other arm relaxed inside the oversized coat. She is framed from mid-thigh to a little above head, vertical portrait.

Wardrobe: oversized brown leather/bomber-style coat with a worn matte sheen, slightly wrinkled texture; very large fit with dropped shoulders. Collar: thick black shearling/faux-fur collar folded up around the neck. No visible logos, no jewelry emphasis.

Location / Background details:

•She stands at the edge of a dark green/black painted wooden doorframe with aged patina; the frame runs vertically on the right side of the image.

•Behind her is a large shop window with reflective glass showing faint street reflections (trees/sky shapes), but interior objects remain visible.

•At the very top of the window, large curved cream lettering reads: “VINS DE PROPRIÉTÉS” (French text, arched across the glass).

•Inside the shop window, a botanical poster is visible on the left side (green leaves illustration), slightly blurred due to depth/reflection.

•Lower left inside the window: a display area with dark surfaces and small objects (bottles/produce-like shapes), dimly lit.

•On the far right edge, partially inside the frame, a black menu/chalkboard with small white writing is visible (text not fully readable), aligned vertically near the doorframe.

Lighting: natural ambient street light, soft and diffused; gentle highlights on cheekbones and nose; shadows are deep but not crushed. No direct flash. The shop interior glows faintly warm compared to the cooler exterior.

Color / Tone / Aesthetic: muted brown, olive-green, charcoal palette; cinematic, slightly desaturated; subtle warm sundayfunday undertone in skin and shop interior; overall dark, cozy, rainy-winter vibe (even if no rain visible). Film grain present, slight halation on highlights, mild vignette, soft contrast roll-off. Background softly blurred but readable; subject sharpest point is face and coat collar. Cooks. 

Composition / Camera: vertical portrait (approx 4:5 feel), subject centered slightly left; window text occupies upper third; doorframe and menu board anchor the right third; medium shot at eye level, ~50mm perspective, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, realistic lens softness toward edges.

Surface / python Texture cues: aged paint on doorframe, smudged window reflections, leather coat creases, fur collar fibers visible, fine pores and natural skin texture
